### [ F57 Request for change of procedure E+W


[ F58 9.18A. — (1) Paragraph (2) applies where the applicant wishes to seek a direction from the court that the standard procedure should apply to an application to which the fast-track procedure would otherwise apply.


(2) Where this paragraph applies, a request for a direction—


(3) Paragraph (4) applies where—


(4) Where this paragraph applies, the respondent’s request or representations—


(5) Where a request or representations referred to in this rule have been made, the court must—


Textual Amendments


F57 Rule 9.18A inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 29 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


F58 Rule 9.18A substituted (4.6.2018) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2018 (S.I. 2018/440) , rules 1 , 9 (with rule 12 )


### Procedure before the first hearing E+W


9.19. —(1) Not more than [ F59 21 ] days after the date of the issue of the application both parties must simultaneously exchange with each other and file with the court a financial statement referred to in Practice Direction 5A.

metadata.title: Part 9 — Applications for a Financial Remedy
